pi_items.source: File path validation from environment setup scripts (setup_edge.sh) confirming /home/ga/Desktop directory is created
File path validation from environment setup scripts confirming /home/ga/Desktop directory is created for user 'ga'
Cloudflare official documentation (developers.cloudflare.com) confirms Cloudflare is a legitimate DNS provider offering DNS-over-HTTPS service with public IP address 1.1.1.1

Web search result from first query confirms: 'Cloudflare has partnerships with Chrome, which led to the creation of the DNS servers chrome.cloudflare-dns.com and mozilla.cloudflare-dns.com.' This endpoint is created through Cloudflare's partnerships with Google Chrome for DNS-over-HTTPS service.

WebFetch of https://one.one.one.one/help/ confirmed the page displays 'Using DNS over HTTPS (DoH)' status indicator. This is Cloudflare's official public verification page hosted at the 1.1.1.1 address.

privileged_info_summary: The task configures Microsoft Edge to use Cloudflare's DNS-over-HTTPS (DoH) service with the endpoint https://chrome.cloudflare-dns.com/dns-query. Cloudflare (1.1.1.1) is a real, publicly available DNS resolver operated by the American company Cloudflare in partnership with APNIC. The chrome.cloudflare-dns.com endpoint is a real service created through Cloudflare's partnerships with Google Chrome. The verification URL https://1.1.1.1/help is Cloudflare's public verification page that displays DNS-over-HTTPS status. All metadata values are accurate references to real, publicly documented services and endpoints.
